known_caveat: run_v4_uranus_strict's audit-only eccentricity/inclination fields are hardcoded to sample Umbriel/Oberon regardless of the candidate's actual sequence; physics propagation is fully generic over sequence (see module docstring). Does not affect passes_v4_strict.
